goal: Create plugins/auto-linkifier.js that turns bare URLs in messages into clickable links
sub_tasks: T1: Create IIFE skeleton with __AutoLinkifierInited guard, PLUGIN_NAME, safe() helper
T3: In handler: scan bubble for bare URLs using regex /https?:\/\/[^\s\)\]>]+/g
T4: Skip URLs inside <a>, <pre>, <code>, or if parent already is <a>
T5: Wrap bare URL in <a target='_blank' rel='noopener'> using textContent for label, href=URL
T6: Append link after the text node (replace text node with [text_before, link, text_after])
T7: Edge case: trailing punctuation (. , ) >) should NOT be in href but kept outside
T8: Test: no eval, no innerHTML, idempotent (reload plugin doesn't double link)
guard_focus: Does it only wrap BARE URLs (not inside existing <a> tags)?
Is href safe (uses textContent for display, href attribute for URL)?
Is trailing punctuation stripped from the link but kept in visible text?
Is the init guard present and working?
No eval, Function, innerHTML with untrusted data
notes: This plugin is ~40 lines. Target file: plugins/auto-linkifier.js. It modifies the DOM of existing messages only — no server changes.
